svg.title: Moonbox TUI screenshot: action-menu
svg.desc: A generated terminal screenshot of Moonbox showing the action-menu fixture scene with session management, handoff, and Vim-style key hints.
svg.text: Skips all Codex confirmation prompts and runs without sandboxing; use only in an externally
Handoff review can generate a target-agent continuation.
Start the target CLI with the first user prompt and attachment paths.
Codex native session fork is available.
Hooks are disabled; no live tmux state is available.
j/k choose enter choose/review action r resume Esc/q close
